title: CV consolidation + DSA Backtracking
focus: Run 60-min CV breadth quiz; rehearse mAP, IoU, U-Net, DETR.

items.label: AlexNet → VGG → Inception → ResNet → DenseNet → EfficientNet
interviewQuestions: What problem did ResNet's residual connections actually solve?
Why did 1×1 convs become so important (Inception, bottleneck blocks)?

items.label: Why ResNet works: identity mappings
interviewQuestions: Explain why training error went UP with depth before ResNet.
Walk me through a residual block.

items.label: Vision Transformer (ViT)
interviewQuestions: How does ViT tokenize an image, and what's the role of the [CLS] token?
When does a ViT beat a CNN, and when does data-hungriness hurt it?

items.label: CLIP: contrastive image-text pretraining
interviewQuestions: How does CLIP enable zero-shot image classification?
Walk me through CLIP's contrastive training objective.
What problem did ResNet's residual connections actually solve?
Why are 1×1 convolutions so important — Inception modules and bottleneck blocks?
How do depthwise separable convolutions reduce compute, and where does MobileNet use them?
